method: Starling-style frontier-judge evidence-span fidelity (QC signal, NOT human gold; S3 remains ground truth)
judge: Claude frontier subagents (5 adversarial judges, ~24 records each)
sample: deterministic organoid-type-stratified, n=120, from exports/public/reagents.jsonl (records with concentration + evidence_quote; 1380 eligible)

flagged_unsupported.reason: in-vivo dose mg kg-1 day-1, not culture concentration; role wrong
quote has FGF2 2.5 nmol/L, not EGF 50 ng/mL
10% is photoreceptor increase, not taurine concentration
